name: Katana Manufacturing ERP API
what_it_does: Katana REST API for SMB manufacturing ERP and MRP (Material Requirements Planning) platform. Enables AI agents to manage product recipes and bills of materials, handle production order scheduling and tracking, access inventory and material management data, retrieve supplier and purchase order data, integrate with ecommerce platforms (Shopify, WooCommerce) for demand-driven production, manage finished goods and work-in-progress tracking, retrieve manufacturing cost and profitability analytics, and connect factory floor data with accounting systems.
use_cases: Managing bills of materials and production schedules from manufacturing automation agents
Tracking inventory levels and material requirements from supply chain agents
Integrating Shopify sales data with production planning from demand-driven manufacturing agents
Retrieving production cost and margin analytics from business intelligence agents
not_for: Large enterprise manufacturing without SMB-scale production workflows
Process manufacturing without discrete product and recipe management
Distribution-only businesses without manufacturing and production focus
best_when: A small-to-mid-size manufacturer or maker brand using Katana wants AI agents to automate production scheduling, BOM management, inventory tracking, ecommerce-to-production workflows, and cost analytics.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Manufacturing BOM and recipe data is proprietary intellectual property. Production cost data is sensitive business information. Automated production order changes must maintain quality and safety standards.

auth.notes: Katana uses API key authentication. Account-level credentials. Good developer documentation. Webhooks for real-time production and inventory events. Rate limits documented. GitHub presence with API examples. No granular scope control.

pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-user pricing; Starter, Standard, and Professional plans
pricing.notes: Tallinn, Estonia. Founded 2017. Cloud-native SMB manufacturing ERP. Used by 2,000+ manufacturers. Strong Shopify and ecommerce integration. Raised $11M Series A. Focus on DTC manufacturing brands. Competes with Fishbowl and Cin7 for SMB manufacturing. Strong European founder base.

performance.rate_limits: 200 requests per minute; documented in API reference

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: BOM and recipe data is proprietary manufacturing IP
No public MCP server — well-documented API key REST API with webhooks
No granular scopes — API key grants full account access
GDPR mandatory for EU-based manufacturers — founder team is European
Ecommerce integration (Shopify) is a core use case — production demand pulled from orders
Production order automation must maintain quality hold and inspection step compliance
agent_readiness.security_notes: Manufacturing production and BOM data. SOC2, GDPR. API key only. EU/US data residency. Proprietary manufacturing IP protection.

security_score_components.security_notes: Manufacturing BOM data. SOC2, GDPR. API key only. EU/US residency. IP protection. No scope granularity.
